description:
Currently WorkflowStatus (7 variants) and WorkflowMachineState (11 variants) are separate enums that must be kept in sync manually. This leads to bugs where workflow.status and workflow.machine_state diverge.

Changes:
1. Make WorkflowMachineState the authoritative source of truth
2. Add a `pub fn workflow_status(&self) -> WorkflowStatus` method that derives the public-facing status from machine state:
   - Idle → Pending
   - EvaluateTransition, RunPhase, EvaluateGates, ApplyTransition → Running
   - Paused → Paused
   - Completed → Completed
   - MergeConflict → Running (or new MergeConflict status)
   - Failed → Failed
   - HumanEscalated → Escalated
   - Cancelled → Cancelled
3. Replace all direct `workflow.status = ...` assignments with state machine event applications that update machine_state, then derive status
4. Keep WorkflowStatus as the serialized/API-facing enum for backwards compatibility
5. Add #[deprecated] or remove the status field from OrchestratorWorkflow, replacing with a computed getter

Key constraint: Must not break JSON serialization of existing workflow state files.

Key files:
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/types.rs
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/workflow/lifecycle_executor.rs
- All files that set workflow.status directly
title: Unify WorkflowStatus and WorkflowMachineState into single source of truth
